taxpayer_name.description: Name of the individual, freelancer, or business entity.

track.description: Track classification: Professional (Sec 44ADA) or Small Business (Sec 44AD).

gross_revenue_inr.description: Total estimated gross revenue/turnover for the financial year.

gst_registered.description: Indicates if the taxpayer is registered under GST.

gstin.description: Indian GST Identification Number (GSTIN), required if registered.
